rule_text: Certain procedures and treatments require approval before service so coverage and medical necessity can be confirmed.
No prior approval is needed for genuine emergency treatment but prompt post-admission notification is still required.
Room and board under Remedy 02 requires prior approval from the insurance company.
Room and board under Remedy 03 requires prior approval from the insurance company.
Elective MRI under Remedy 02 requires pre-approval from the insurance company.
Elective MRI under Remedy 03 requires pre-approval from the insurance company.
